candidates.title: Product Demo and Marketplace Readiness Pack

candidates.title: Product Demo Evidence Bundle

candidates.user_value: Demo evidence is generated and verified deterministically for reviewers.
candidates.safety_boundary: Local deterministic artifact build/check; no network calls.

candidates.title: Reviewer Trust Snapshot

candidates.title: Reviewer Trust Snapshot Workflow

safety_boundaries: Live trading remains disabled by default.
Live submit remains disabled by default.
Provider execution remains disabled by default.
Broker execution remains disabled by default.
Risk gates remain deterministic and unchanged.
Human approval remains required for live order flow.
Credentials are not loaded unless explicitly configured.
No provider APIs, broker APIs, or real webhooks are called from CI or local checks.
constraints: CAND-009 and CAND-011 through CAND-016 implemented/audited
CAND-008 and CAND-010 explicitly marked as not separately tracked
No tag, GitHub release, or PyPI publish for v0.6.12
release_criteria: Accepted candidates are implemented/audited and CAND-008/010 disposition is documented
dev_check, ci_check, and release_check --quick pass locally
CI on main is green after each batch is pushed
Version is bumped to 0.6.12 in pyproject.toml and src/atlas_agent/__init__.py
scripts/check_v0612_release_prep.py and matching tests are created (release-prep mode)
Owner approval is obtained for tag cutover
